Current configuration:
!
ver 08.0.95qT213
!
stack unit 1
  module 1 icx7150-c12-poe-port-management-module
  module 2 icx7150-2-copper-port-2g-module
  module 3 icx7150-2-sfp-plus-port-20g-module
!
!
global-stp
!
!
!
vlan 1 name DEFAULT-VLAN by port
!
vlan 20 name management by port
 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 untagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/4
 router-interface ve 1
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
 multicast passive
!
vlan 30 name servers by port
 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 untagged ethe 1/1/5 to 1/1/8
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!

 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!

 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
vlan 60 name containers by port
 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
vlan 70 name iot by port
 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 untagged ethe 1/1/9 to 1/1/12
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
!
vlan 900 name ISP-primary by port
 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 untagged ethe 1/2/1
!
vlan 901 name ISP-secondary by port
 tagged ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2
 untagged ethe 1/2/2
!

optical-monitor
optical-monitor non-ruckus-optic-enable
aaa authentication web-server default local
aaa authentication login default local
enable aaa console
ip dhcp-client disable
ip default-network 10.0.20.0/24
ip route 0.0.0.0/0 10.0.20.1
!
no telnet server
username admin password .....

manager registrar
!
manager port-list 987

!

interface ethernet 1/2/1
 port-name isp-primary
 spanning-tree 802-1w admin-pt2pt-mac
!
interface ethernet 1/2/2
 port-name isp-secondary
!
interface ethernet 1/3/1
 port-name trunk to core
!
interface ethernet 1/3/2
 port-name trunk to remote
 spanning-tree 802-1w admin-pt2pt-mac
!
interface ve 1
 ip address 10.0.20.4 255.255.255.0
